articles.title: Red Sox 1B Willson Contreras leaves game with bruised hand after getting hit by pitch
articles.description:
Contreras stayed in the game while the Red Sox finished their at-bats, but Andruw Monasterio came out to play first at the top of the second.

The post Red Sox 1B Willson Contreras leaves game with bruised hand after getting hit by pitch appeared first on Boston.com.
